nasb.text: and they shall lay a covering of porpoise skin on it, and shall spread over it a cloth of pure blue, and shall insert its poles.

esv.text: Then they shall put on it a covering of goatskin and spread on top of that a cloth all of blue, and shall put in its poles.

cnv.text: 又把海狗皮罩蓋在上面，再鋪上純藍色的布，然後把槓穿上。

ccb.text: 再在上面依次盖上海狗皮和纯蓝色的布，然后穿上抬约柜的横杠。
